execution_batch_template.default: Execution: BATCH — one agent per batch (~{min}-{max} entries), parallel
execution_batch_template.title: Execution Batch Template

execution_full.default: Execution: FULL — single agent, all input at once
execution_full.title: Execution Full

with_args_intro.default: When the user provides specific targets:
with_args_intro.title: With Args Intro

scope_mandatory_warning.default: MANDATORY: Every step requires actual tool calls. Never use cached or remembered state.
scope_mandatory_warning.title: Scope Mandatory Warning

scope_intro.default: When the user provides no arguments:
scope_intro.title: Scope Intro

scope_step_assess.default: **Assess state** — Read the filesystem to determine what work exists, what is already done, and what is stale
scope_step_assess.title: Scope Step Assess

scope_step_present.default: **Present options** — Use AskUserQuestion to present sensible choices to the user
scope_step_present.title: Scope Step Present

scope_step_prepare.default: **Prepare input** — Based on user selection, prepare the {input_format} input{delivery_note}
scope_step_prepare.title: Scope Step Prepare

batch_manifest_explanation.default: This outputs a JSONL manifest to stdout — one line per batch:
batch_manifest_explanation.title: Batch Manifest Explanation

batch_parse_instruction.default: Parse the manifest. Each line is one agent invocation.
batch_parse_instruction.title: Batch Parse Instruction

dispatch_launch_instruction.default: Launch ALL Agent tool calls in a **SINGLE message** for foreground parallel execution.
dispatch_launch_instruction.title: Dispatch Launch Instruction

dispatch_background_warning.default: **Do NOT use `run_in_background`.** Foreground parallel returns all results in one response.
dispatch_background_warning.title: Dispatch Background Warning

dispatch_tempfile_note.default: Tempfiles survive agent failure — failed batches can be redispatched without regenerating input.
dispatch_tempfile_note.title: Dispatch Tempfile Note

post_dispatch_step_redispatch.default: If any agents failed, offer to redispatch the failed batches
post_dispatch_step_redispatch.title: Post Dispatch Step Redispatch

rule_thin_prompt.default: **Task prompt is thin.** `subagent_type` + input path + parameters. The agent already knows its job.
rule_thin_prompt.title: Rule Thin Prompt

rule_foreground.default: **Foreground parallel.** All Agent calls in a single message. No background dispatch.
rule_foreground.title: Rule Foreground

rule_tempfiles.default: **Tempfiles survive failure.** Never clean up tempfiles automatically.
rule_tempfiles.title: Rule Tempfiles

rule_no_cache.default: **State is never cached.** Every filesystem check is a real tool call.
rule_no_cache.title: Rule No Cache

rule_user_invoked.default: **User-invoked only.** This skill runs only when explicitly requested.
rule_user_invoked.title: Rule User Invoked

SectionStyle.description: Base for section styles. Provides heading, framing, and warning.
SectionStyle.title: SectionStyle

description: Complete style: per-section text models + optional dispatcher text.
title: StyleConfig
